name: Thirdweb

seo.title: Thirdweb — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Thirdweb: Thirdweb — Web3 development platform providing smart contract SDKs, wallet connection, and IPFS deployment tooling.

when_to_use: Smart contract SDK for rapid Web3 dapp development
Wallet connection library for multi-wallet Web3 auth
IPFS deployment for decentralized app assets
Pre-built NFT and token contracts for marketplaces

review.verdict: Fastest path to shipping Web3 dApps with batteries included, though audit their templates before production.
review.best_for: Web3 developers prototyping NFT or token projects fast
review.not_for: Teams needing custom-audited bespoke smart contracts
